title: Lava Chicken Music
description: Replaces all music with the Lava Chicken Song
body:
## Ever wanted to know what happens when you mix lava, with chicken?

**The pack modifies every single piece of MC music. There is another version on Modrinth that just replaces disc 11.**

Here's the link: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lava-chicken-disc-11](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lava-chicken-disc-11)
